title: ESG Currents: Transition Builds Resistance in Emerging Markets
title_cn: ESG 潮流：转型在新兴市场中形成阻力
summary: Emerging markets are central to the global sustainability transition and increasingly at the forefront of innovation in sustainable finance, from debt-for-food swaps to biodiversity-linked sovereign bonds. On this week’s episode of the ESG Currents podcast, Nicolas Jaquier, a portfolio manager on the emerging markets fixed income team at Ninety One, where he co-manages the Emerging Market Sustainable Blend strategy, joins Bloomberg Intelligence’s Chris Ratti and Grace Osborne. They discuss the r

title: Stocks Halt Rally on Conflicting US-Iran Signals: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 美国与伊朗相互冲突的信号导致股市停止上涨：市场结束
summary: Wall Street traders sent stocks lower amid mixed signals about prospects for a US-Iran deal to end the war and revive energy flows through the key Strait of Hormuz.

title: White House Reviews CFTC Plan to Supervise Prediction Markets
title_cn: 白宫审查 CFTC 监管预测市场的计划
summary: The White House is reviewing a new US Commodity Futures Trading Commission proposal that would lay out guidelines for event contracts, the agency’s latest move to mark its turf as it battles with states over who gets to regulate the exploding prediction markets.

title: Warner Bros. Set to Price $15 Billion Loan Deal Amid High Demand
title_cn: 华纳兄弟将在高需求下定价 150 亿美元贷款交易
summary: Final terms have been set on $15 billion of Warner Bros. Discovery Inc. loans, as the media company refinances debt ahead of its pending acquisition by Paramount Skydance Corp.

title: Defense Firm CSG’s Founder Seeks Money to Expand New Group
title_cn: 防务公司 CSG 创始人寻求资金扩大新集团
summary: The founder of CSG NV, which completed the biggest ever initial public offering for a pure defense company four months ago, is seeking to raise as much as €200 million ($233 million) this year to expand his industrial group.

title: National Bank Beats on Overall Strength in Major Segments
title_cn: 国家银行在主要领域的整体实力表现出色
summary: National Bank of Canada beat analyst expectations in its fiscal second quarter on strength across major segments while setting aside less than anticipated for bad loans. The shares fell on valuation concerns.

title: European Stocks Erase Gains After US Denies Peace Deal Reports
title_cn: 美国否认和平协议报告后欧洲股市回吐涨幅
summary: European stocks were steady after erasing gains as hopes for a deal between Tehran and Washington were dampened by the White House denying Iranian reports about a draft memorandum of understanding.

title: Ousted BP Chair Says He Was Fired Without Explanation
title_cn: 被罢黜的英国石油公司主席表示，他在没有任何解释的情况下被解雇
summary:
BP's former Chairman Albert Manifold says he was fired without warning or explanation and will challenge the company's version of events.

Manifold was fired on Tuesday after eight months on the job, as Ruth David explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Jefferies Says Investors Boost ‘Nuclear Exposure’: ESG Investing
title_cn: 杰富瑞称投资者加大“核暴露”：ESG 投资
summary: Almost two-thirds of fund managers permit some level of “nuclear exposure,” with 34% allowing investments in nuclear weaponry, according to Jefferies Financial Group Inc.’s fourth-annual ESG and defense survey.

title: US Stocks Slip as White House Rejects Iran Peace Deal Reports
title_cn: 白宫拒绝伊朗和平协议报告，美国股市下跌
summary: US stocks shuffled between gains and losses on Wednesday, as strategists lifted their S&P 500 year-end targets following a strong earnings season and traders weighed conflicting reports on a deal to end the Iran war.

title: Gold Declines as Middle East Risks Reinforce Higher Rates Bets
title_cn: 中东风险加剧加息押注，金价下跌
summary: Gold fell for a second day as concerns that continued conflict in the Middle East will prolong inflation and keep borrowing costs elevated outweighed prospects of a US-Iran peace deal.

title: Strait of Hormuz Traffic Fades to a Crawl After Supertankers Exit
title_cn: 超级油轮退出后霍尔木兹海峡交通变得缓慢
summary: Commercial shipping through the Strait of Hormuz dwindled to only a few mostly Iran-linked vessels crossing on Wednesday, underscoring the stop-start nature of traffic through the world’s most vital energy chokepoint.

title: El Niño Threat Prompts Peru to Extend Halt on Anchovy Fishing
title_cn: 厄尔尼诺现象威胁促使秘鲁延长鳀鱼捕捞暂停期
summary: Peru has extended a halt on anchovy fishing due to a warming of the Pacific waters off the country’s coast, as the threat of a weather-roiling El Niño looms.

title: Popular X Account Sparks Massive Rally in Little-Known Chipmaker
title_cn: 热门 X 账户引发鲜为人知的芯片制造商的大规模反弹
summary: Shares of a little-known European chip manufacturer soared more than 70% on Wednesday after being touted by a popular social media account.

title: Sugar Optimism Hinges on El Niño Impact
title_cn: 糖业乐观情绪取决于厄尔尼诺现象的影响
summary:
As Americans confront a surge in prices at the pump, another inflation wave is headed for the grocery store.
A combination of factors including bad weather, tariffs and a dwindling cattle herd are already pushing up grocery prices at an above-average pace. 
In April, they rose by the most in nearly four years, and economists say the impact of the Iran war and a potential El Niño weather pattern will only add to pressures into 2027.
Arkady Gevorkyan, Citi Commodities Strategist, breaks down how this weather pattern will impact pricing across commodities, especially sugar. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Germany’s Gas Grids Urge Overhaul of Storage Filling Incentives
title_cn: 德国天然气管网敦促彻底改革储气激励措施
summary: Germany’s gas grid operators are calling for sweeping changes to the way storage refills are encouraged, warning that stubbornly low inventory levels are heightening the risk of supply shortages ahead of winter.

title: Investors Say Time Is Now for Pemex to Tap Global Debt Markets
title_cn: 投资者表示墨西哥国家石油公司现在是时候进军全球债务市场了
summary: Investors say the time is right for state-owned Petroleos Mexicanos SA to sell global bonds for the first time in more than three years.

title: Lululemon Board Shake-Up; Bath and Body Works Overhaul | Stock Movers
title_cn: Lululemon 董事会改组；沐浴和身体工程大修|库存搬运工
summary:
On this episode of Stock Movers with Alexis Christoforous:

- Dick's Sporting Goods (DKS) shares are lower after it forecast earnings per share for the full year of $13.27 to $14.27.
- Lululemon (LULU) is up as it agreed to resolve a long-simmering dispute with founder Chip Wilson by overhauling its board with three new directors. The company will name two of Wilson’s nominees to the board in Laura Gentile, a former ESPN executive, and Marc Maurer, the previous co-chief executive officer of sneaker maker On. A third new director will be announced by October 1.
- Bath and Body Works (BBWI) shares are higher after it reported lower first quarter sales and says it's overhauling its strategy to return to growth. Sales were still better than expected. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bloomberg Surveillance 5/27/2026
title_cn: 彭博社监测 2026 年 5 月 27 日
summary: Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern speak daily with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond. No other program better positions investors and executives for the trading day. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Slides as Traders Weigh Signs of Iran Peace Deal Progress
title_cn: 交易员权衡伊朗和平协议进展迹象，油价下跌
summary: Oil tumbled on optimism that the US and Iran will reach a peace deal, even as the two countries made conflicting statements on the progress of talks.

title: Copasa Shares Tumble After Bids for Stake Fall Below Minimum Price
title_cn: 股权出价低于最低价格后，Copasa 股价暴跌
summary: The two bids presented for a 30% stake in the Brazilian water utility Copasa fell below the minimum price expected by the Minas Gerais state government, according to four people familiar with the matter.

title: Canada’s Carney to Meet Macron in Paris Ahead of June G7 Summit
title_cn: 加拿大卡尼将在 6 月 G7 峰会之前在巴黎会见马克龙
summary: Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney will make an early visit to Paris ahead of the Group of Seven leaders summit next month to meet with French President Emmanuel Macron, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Lululemon Resolves Feud With Founder Chip Wilson
title_cn: Lululemon 解决与创始人 Chip Wilson 的不和
summary: Lululemon Athletica Inc. is ending a long-running fight with founder Chip Wilson. It will appoint two of his nominees to the board following this year's annual meeting. Bloomberg's Romaine Bostick reports.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ellison Privately Vows to Limit Enlarged Paramount’s Debt
title_cn: 埃里森私下誓言限制派拉蒙扩大后的债务
summary: It began as a concession in private conversations to assuage wary credit analysts looking at Paramount Skydance Corp.’s blockbuster takeover of Warner Bros. Discovery Inc.: a verbal pledge by the Ellison family to do whatever it takes to slash debt at the combined company.

title: Oil Barges Forced to Carry Less Fuel as Rhine Water Level Drops
title_cn: 由于莱茵河水位下降，油驳船被迫减少燃料运输
summary: Falling water levels on one of Europe’s most important rivers are restricting the amount of oil barges can carry, adding more pressure to the region’s fuel supply chains as the Iran war grinds on.

title: India Issues Tender to Import Fertilizer Ahead of Monsoon Sowing
title_cn: 印度在季风播种前发出进口化肥招标
summary: India is seeking offers from global suppliers to buy 1.7 million tons of urea, a widely used nitrogen fertilizer, ahead of the monsoon sowing season, as the Middle East conflict disrupted gas supplies for domestic output.

title: US Lenders Posted Winning First Quarter, FDIC Says
title_cn: FDIC 表示，美国银行第一季度盈利
summary: Key metrics at US banks improved during the first quarter despite war and rising interest rates, even as the industry grappled with a modest increase in paper losses, the Federal Deposit Insurance Corp. reported.

title: Goldman Strategists Cite Earnings in Hiking S&P 500 Target to 8,000
title_cn: 高盛策略师表示，标普 500 指数目标将上涨至 8,000 点
summary: Strategists at Goldman Sachs increased their year-end target for the US benchmark to 8,000 points, ditching a previous forecast of 7,600. They see earnings growth powered by the AI boom driving further gains in stocks. Michael Msika reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hormuz Would Reopen One Month After Deal, Iran TV Says
title_cn: 伊朗电视台称霍尔木兹将在协议达成一个月后重新开放
summary: An unofficial draft of a peace deal says the Strait of Hormuz would return to normal within a month, according to Iranian state television. It also says the the US naval blockade would end. Oil prices fell on the news. It's unclear what the US has agreed to. Bloomberg's Tyler Kendall reports.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Both Sides of Aisle Support Crypto: Paglia
title_cn: 过道两侧均支持加密货币：Paglia
summary: Katrina Paglia, chief legal officer at Pantera Capital Management, joins Isabelle Lee and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." A key Senate panel recently moved forward the so-called Clarity Act even as bank associations said the bill “falls short.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Singapore Hands Byju's Founder His First Ever Jail Term
title_cn: 新加坡让 Byju 创始人首次入狱
summary: The fallen billionaire was sentenced to six months in jail for contempt of court.

title: Spotify, Netflix Woo Podcaster Jay Shetty From YouTube in New Deal
title_cn: Spotify、Netflix Woo 播客 Jay Shetty 在新政中来自 YouTube
summary: The agreement is worth as much as $100 million over multiple years.

title: Dutch Police Seize Servers, Deal Blow to Russian Hackers
title_cn: 荷兰警方扣押服务器，打击俄罗斯黑客
summary: The Dutch financial crimes agency raided two data centers in the country and seized 800 servers.

title: AI Coding Startup Cognition Raises $1 Billion at $26 Billion Value
title_cn: AI 编码初创公司 Cognition 融资 10 亿美元，估值 260 亿美元
summary: Cognition AI Inc. has raised more than $1 billion in a new funding round at a $26 billion valuation, the latest sign of strong demand for companies using artificial intelligence for software development.

title: Sony Takes Final Bow As Standalone TV Maker With New Bravia Sets
title_cn: 索尼凭借全新 Bravia 电视机，最终成为独立电视制造商
summary: Sony Group Corp. unveiled two high-end televisions, which are likely to be the Japanese company’s last premium sets before its storied home theater business merges with TCL Electronics Holdings Ltd. next year.

title: How AI Is Supercharging Small Business
title_cn: 人工智能如何为小型企业提供动力
summary: John Caplan, the CEO of the financial technology company Payoneer, joined Bloomberg Open Interest to break down why small businesses are thriving despite tariffs, economic volatility, and AI disruption. He explains how global trade routes are shifting, why small and medium-sized businesses are staying international instead of going local, and how AI is helping entrepreneurs compete with much larger companies. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hunstad: Staying Risk-On in the AI Boom
title_cn: Hunstad：在人工智能热潮中保持风险意识
summary: Northern Trust Asset Management President Michael Hunstad joins Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why Wall Street is still underestimating AI’s economic impact. From margin expansion and AI-powered investing to why the Fed may stay restrictive because of productivity gains, Hunstad lays out a bullish case for markets and the next phase of the AI boom. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: New CLOs at Blackstone, Guggenheim Boast Key Perk: Less Software
title_cn: Blackstone 和 Guggenheim 的新 CLO 拥有关键优势：更少的软件
summary: Blackstone Inc. and Guggenheim Investments are among investment firms reducing software exposure in some of their recent collateralized loan obligation deals out of growing caution over AI disruption.

title: Stocks Hold Near Record on AI Trade as Oil Falls
title_cn: 随着油价下跌，人工智能交易股票保持接近纪录
summary:
Hopes for a deal to end the Iran war and revive the Strait of Hormuz drove oil lower while leaving stocks near record highs, with the market also supported by enthusiasm for artificial-intelligence trades.
Mina Krishnan, Multi-Asset Portfolio Manager at Schroders, gives her current market outlook and what to expect from inflation and GDP forecasts for the remainder of 2026. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nasdaq President on Winning SpaceX IPO, Rule Changes
title_cn: 纳斯达克总裁谈赢得 SpaceX IPO、规则变更
summary: Nasdaq President Nelson Griggs says no rules were broken in winning the SpaceX initial public offering, which could be the largest ever. He does talk about new rules that let companies get added to its index faster. He speaks on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Micron Blows Past $1 Trillion on AI Demand
title_cn: 美光科技 AI 需求突破 1 万亿美元
summary: Micron has experienced a significant market surge, surpassing a $1 trillion valuation driven by robust demand in the artificial intelligence sector. Despite this, the company remains undervalued, trading at under 10 times forward earnings. Bloomberg Intelligence's Jake Silverman has more on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Natura AI Partnership Aims to Shake Up Brazil’s Beauty Routines
title_cn: Natura AI 合作伙伴关系旨在改变巴西的美容习惯
summary: Natura Cosmeticos SA plans to launch products next year created using artificial intelligence, part of the Brazilian beauty company’s push to develop new uses for the plant-based ingredients in its portfolio.

title: EU Satellite Proposal Makes Limited Room for Musk’s Starlink
title_cn: 欧盟卫星提案为马斯克的星链计划提供了有限的空间
summary: The European Union proposed new rules for satellite access that will allow non-European firms, like Elon Musk’s Starlink, to bid for the airwaves while preserving most spectrum licenses for local companies.

title: Roku’s First Major Home Screen Revamp in Years Will Open Up More Ad Opportunities
title_cn: Roku 多年来首次对主屏幕进行重大改造，将带来更多广告机会
summary: Roku Inc. unveiled the first major update to its home-screen user experience in a decade, a move that sets the platform up for additional advertising opportunities.

title: Salesforce Earnings Can Put AI Fears to Bed, Give Stock a Lift
title_cn: Salesforce 的盈利可以消除对人工智能的恐惧，提振股价
summary: While software stocks rebound from the artificial intelligence-driven wipeout earlier this year, Salesforce Inc. hasn’t really benefited. But its earnings after the close Wednesday could pull the company’s shares out of their malaise.

title: Morgan Stanley's Caron Says This Is a Stock Pickers Market
title_cn: 摩根士丹利的卡伦表示这是一个选股市场
summary: Jim Caron, Morgan Stanley Investment Management portfolio solutions CIO, says this is a stock pickers market, but it's still very important to have a diversified portfolio. He speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Temu-Owner PDD’s Shares Slide After Sales Miss Estimates
title_cn: Temu 所有者 PDD 的股价在销售未达到预期后下滑
summary: PDD Holding Inc.’s shares fell more than 9% in pre-market US trading on Wednesday after its first-quarter revenue missed expectations partly due to fierce domestic competition and weak consumer sentiment in China.

title: Global Clean-Energy Manufacturing Supply Far Exceeds Demand
title_cn: 全球清洁能源制造业供应远超需求
summary: Clean-energy manufacturers around the world now have double the production capacity needed to meet global renewable energy demand as factory output surges in Asia while the US and Europe lag behind.

title: Dwelly in Talks to Raise $200 Million for AI Property Management
title_cn: Dwelly 正在洽谈为人工智能物业管理筹集 2 亿美元资金
summary: Dwelly, a UK startup that acquires real estate property managers and introduces artificial intelligence to their business, is in discussions to raise around $200 million in equity and debt financing, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: AP CEO Defends Swatch Collaboration
title_cn: AP 首席执行官捍卫 Swatch 合作
summary:
Audemars Piguet's recent collaboration with Swatch led to scuffles outside stores from New York to Paris to Milan, as crowds queued for hours to get their hands on the Royal Pop pocket watch collection. Despite criticism that the collaboration could 'cheapen' the brand, CEO Ilaria Resta says it has made AP more accessible to a younger audience, while the thing she fears most is 'irrelevance'. She spoke on 'The Pulse with Francine Lacqua' on Bloomberg TV on May 26.

Correct: This video has been edited to change an on-screen banner to more accurately reflect the story. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Robinhood Launches AI Stock Trading, Purchases on Credit Cards
title_cn: Robinhood 推出人工智能股票交易、信用卡购买
summary: Robinhood Markets Inc. customers will soon be able to direct artificial intelligence agents to trade equities and make purchases on their credit cards for them.

title: Data Center Firm PolarDC Sets Nordic Record With Junk Bond Sale
title_cn: 数据中心公司 PolarDC 出售垃圾债券创下北欧纪录
summary: Data center operator PolarDC sold €800 million ($930 million) of high-yield bonds in the biggest deal of its kind in the Nordic market.

title: Goldman Strategists Lift S&P 500 Target to 8,000 on Earnings
title_cn: 高盛策略师将标普 500 指数盈利目标上调至 8,000 点
summary: Strategists at Goldman Sachs Group Inc. joined peers at Morgan Stanley and Deutsche Bank AG in seeing a 17% return for the S&P 500 Index this year.

title: Airbnb and Uber Are Competing to Be the Next Big Travel Super App
title_cn: Airbnb 和 Uber 竞相成为下一个大型旅行超级应用
summary: Neither company appears content to lead just one category

title: TSMC CEO Pledges 30%-Plus Incentive Bump as AI Profits Soar
title_cn: 台积电首席执行官承诺随着人工智能利润飙升 30% 以上的激励措施
summary: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. chief C.C. Wei told staff they’ll see more than a 30% bump in their profit-sharing payouts this year on average, responding after some voiced concerns over their incentive plans online.

title: Schaeffler Moves Into Spacecraft to Diversify From Automaking
title_cn: 舍弗勒进军航天器，实现汽车制造多元化
summary: Schaeffler AG is pushing into the space industry through a partnership with satellite operator Spire Global Inc. as the German car-parts maker tries to reduce reliance on the struggling automotive sector.

title: UBS’s Haefele Is Bullish on Equity Rally Broadening Out
title_cn: 瑞银 (UBS) 的海弗勒 (Haefele) 看好股市反弹扩大
summary: Mark Haefele, CIO of global wealth management at UBS, discusses the impact of AI on global equities as he raises his year-end target on the S&P 500 to 7,900. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: More Companies Turn to Monitoring Employee AI Skills
title_cn: 更多公司开始监控员工人工智能技能
summary: Crypto exchange OKX joins KPMG and other firms changing performance evaluations

title: Trump Claims Nobody Will Control Hormuz, US to Watch Over It
title_cn: 特朗普声称没有人会控制霍尔木兹，美国对其进行监视
summary: President Donald Trump said that no one nation would control the Strait of Hormuz, pushing back on Iranian demands to manage the vital energy waterway.

title: Trump Says Iran Is 'Negotiating on Fumes'
title_cn: 特朗普称伊朗正在进行“烟雾谈判”
summary: President Donald Trump says Iran is negotiating on fumes, their economic system has broken down, and they want to make a deal. He speaks in the White House during a meeting with Cabinet officials. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says US Is Not Satisfied Yet on Iran Deal (Remarks)
title_cn: 特朗普称美国尚未对伊朗协议感到满意（评论）
summary:
President Trump says the US is not satisfied yet on Iran deal, “but we will be.” Speaking at a White House cabinet meeting, Trump added that Iran wants to make a deal and are "negotiating on fumes."

Earlier Wednesday, the US denied an Iranian state television report on a draft interim peace deal that said maritime traffic through the Strait of Hormuz could return to normal within a month of it coming into effect. “This report from Iranian controlled media is not true and the MOU they ‘released’ is a complete fabrication,” the White House said in a social media post on Wednesday. “Nobody should believe what Iranian state media is putting out.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Denies Iran Report on Draft Peace Deal to Reopen Hormuz
title_cn: 美国否认伊朗关于重新开放霍尔木兹的和平协议草案的报告
summary:
The US denied an Iranian state television report on a draft interim peace deal that said maritime traffic through the Strait of Hormuz could return to normal within a month of it coming into effect.

“This report from Iranian controlled media is not true and the MOU they ‘released’ is a complete fabrication,” the White House said in a social media post on Wednesday. “Nobody should believe what Iranian state media is putting out.” Oil had dropped on the Iranian report, with Brent falling almost 4% to below $96 a barrel. It’s declined more than 7% this week as traders become increasingly more optimistic there will be an agreement.

Ethan Bronner, Bloomberg News Israel Bureau Chief, joins Bloomberg Intelligence Radio to discuss the latest. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How Israel’s Battle With Hezbollah Fits Into the Iran War
title_cn: 以色列与真主党的战斗如何融入伊朗战争
summary: When the Lebanese militia Hezbollah entered the US-Israeli war against Iran by firing rockets and drones into Israel the day after the conflict began on Feb. 28, officials there saw in the crisis sweeping the region a chance to finally drive the militia, already weakened by a series of setbacks, away from Israel’s northern border. They’ve been loath to give it up.

title: Why Switzerland’s 10-Million Population Cap is Worrying Executives
title_cn: 为什么瑞士的 1000 万人口上限令高管们感到担忧
summary: Switzerland will vote on a plan to cap the population at 10 million, requiring a severe reduction in immigration. Allegra Catelli explains why that has business executives worried. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: NY’s Budget Adds Second-Home Tax, Nixes Levy on Cash Purchases
title_cn: 纽约州预算增加第二居所税，取消现金购买税
summary: New York lawmakers outlined a revenue package for the state budget that includes a new surcharge on pricey second homes in the city, but omits a proposal to tax all-cash property purchases.

title: Vulnerable Republicans Chase Trump Boost Despite November Risks
title_cn: 尽管11月存在风险，脆弱的共和党人仍追逐特朗普的加息
summary:
Vulnerable House Republicans who have yet to survive a primary are embracing President Donald Trump on the campaign trail, despite the potential consequences in November of tying themselves to an unpopular president.
Libby Cantrill, Managing Director: Public Policy at PIMCO, discusses the outcome of recent runoff elections and where the GOP stands ahead of midterms in November. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Erdogan Seeks to Meet Trump Around Soccer World Cup to Discuss NATO
title_cn: 埃尔多安寻求在足球世界杯期间与特朗普会面，讨论北约问题
summary: Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdogan is trying to arrange a meeting with President Donald Trump around the time of a Turkey-US World Cup soccer game in Los Angeles next month, people familiar with the matter said.

title: Ex-Environment Minister to Quit Carney’s Caucus After Climate Reversals
title_cn: 气候逆转后前环境部长退出卡尼核心小组
summary: A former Canadian environment minister will resign his seat in the coming months after Prime Minister Mark Carney’s government watered down its climate policy.

title: DeSantis Proposes Axing Taxes on Primary Homes in Florida
title_cn: 德桑蒂斯提议对佛罗里达州的主要住宅减税
summary: Florida Governor Ron DeSantis unveiled a much-awaited proposal to gradually eliminate property taxes on the vast majority of primary homes in the state, a measure that would transform the way the state finances itself.

title: Canada Is in Talks to Buy Saab’s GlobalEye Surveillance Jets to Bolster Military
title_cn: 加拿大正在洽谈购买萨博全球眼监视机以增强军事实力
summary: Canada entered into negotiations to buy Saab AB’s GlobalEye military surveillance planes, rejecting American bids as the northern nation pushes to spend fewer defense dollars in the US.

title: US Denies Iran Report on Draft Peace Deal to Reopen Hormuz
title_cn: 美国否认伊朗关于重新开放霍尔木兹的和平协议草案的报告
summary: The US denied an Iranian state television report on a draft interim peace deal that said maritime traffic through the Strait of Hormuz could return to normal within a month of it coming into effect.

title: US Eases Some Tariffs on Taiwan to Formalize Trade Agreement
title_cn: 美国放松对台湾的部分关税以正式达成贸易协定
summary: The Trump administration is removing some tariffs on imports from Taiwan to implement parts of a previously agreed trade deal with the US.

title: Philippine Senator Marcos Vows Objectivity in Duterte Trial
title_cn: 菲律宾参议员马科斯誓言杜特尔特审判的客观性
summary: Senator Imee Marcos hopes the trial of impeached Philippine Vice President Sara Duterte would conclude by September and says she prefers that only evidence pertinent to the case would be presented in the proceedings. Duterte will be tried in the Senate that’s set to start in July and Marcos, the estranged sister of President Ferdinand Marcos Jr., is among 13 lawmakers from the 24-member chamber allied with the vice president. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Mamdani Plan to Extend NYC Pension Payments Will Cost $5 Billion
title_cn: Mamdani 延长纽约市养老金支付计划将耗资 50 亿美元
summary: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani’s plan to extend the timetable to pay off the city’s pension debt will free up money in the near term to close a yawning budget deficit.

title: Germany, Canada to Sign Major LNG Deal as Europe Seeks Energy Security
title_cn: 欧洲寻求能源安全，德国和加拿大将签署重大液化天然气协议
summary: Canada has reached a deal to supply Germany with liquefied natural gas from a planned facility on the west coast, a boost for Prime Minister Mark Carney, who wants to double the country’s exports to non-US markets.

title: EU Should Lead Peace Talks with Russia, Bulgarian Premier Says
title_cn: 保加利亚总理表示欧盟应主导与俄罗斯的和平谈判
summary: The European Union should take the lead in talks with Russia to end its full-scale invasion of Ukraine, Bulgaria’s newly-appointed prime minister said, as member states discuss whether to directly engage with the Kremlin.

title: Ukraine Rejects Merz Plan for Halfway-House Deal on Joining EU
title_cn: 乌克兰拒绝梅尔茨关于加入欧盟的中途协议的计划
summary: President Volodymyr Zelenskyy rebuffed the idea of Ukraine getting partial membership of the European Union, arguing that his country deserves to be granted full status because its forces are defending all of the bloc from Russia.

title: Zelenskyy Warns Trump of Ukraine’s Critical Air-Defense Shortage
title_cn: 泽伦斯基警告特朗普乌克兰严重的防空短缺
summary: Ukraine is running short on key US-made air-defense supplies that it needs to intercept Russia’s ballistic missiles, President Volodymyr Zelenskyy said in a letter to Donald Trump and US Congress seen by Bloomberg.

title: Andy Burnham’s Manchester Boom and the Areas It Left Behind
title_cn: 安迪·伯纳姆的曼彻斯特繁荣及其留下的地区
summary: Andy Burnham, the hot favorite to be Britain’s next prime minister, has boasted of a growth miracle in Greater Manchester where he’s been mayor for just under a decade.

title: Paxton Trounces Cornyn in Texas After Trump’s Endorsement
title_cn: 特朗普支持后，帕克斯顿在德克萨斯州击败科宁
summary: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton stormed to a blowout victory in the state’s Republican Senate runoff, handily defeating four-term incumbent John Cornyn and setting the stage for a November showdown with a well-funded Democrat, James Talarico.

title: Keeping Promise to Putin, Slovak Premier Opens Rebuilt Cemetery
title_cn: 信守对普京的承诺，斯洛伐克总理为重建的公墓开放
summary: Slovak Prime Minister Robert Fico unveiled a refurbished cemetery dedicated to the Red Army’s soldiers, fulfilling a promise he made to Russian President Vladimir Putin less than three weeks ago.

title: Canada Property Owners Cry Foul After $1 Billion Indigenous Land-Rights Ruling
title_cn: 加拿大业主对价值 10 亿美元的原住民土地权利裁决表示不满
summary: Landmark court decisions on Indigenous rights have rattled liberal British Columbia — and risk costing the premier his job.

title: Mozambique Disputes $2 Billion Claims for Total LNG Project
title_cn: 莫桑比克对总液化天然气项目20亿美元索赔提出争议
summary: Mozambique is disputing $2 billion in costs that TotalEnergies SE and its partners say they incurred during a years-long stoppage of their liquefied natural gas project that’s under construction in the southeast Africa nation, according to a person with knowledge of the matter.

title: India Should Ease Rules to Revive FDI, Modi’s Former Aide Says
title_cn: 莫迪前助手表示，印度应放宽规则以重振外国直接投资
summary: India should liberalize rules for overseas investors by easing dispute-resolution procedures and offering tax incentives to revive foreign inflows and support economic growth, a former adviser to Prime Minister Narendra Modi said.

title: Russia Boosts Crude Flows as Kremlin Banks Gains From Iran War
title_cn: 克里姆林宫从伊朗战争中获益，俄罗斯增加原油流量
summary: India’s oil imports from Russia have jumped by 70% since February

title: Trump’s Defeat of Cornyn Is a Win for Him, But Also Democrats
title_cn: 特朗普击败科宁是他的胜利，也是民主党的胜利
summary: President Donald Trump finished off the political career of four-term Texas Republican US Senator John Cornyn, the latest purge in a score-settling revenge tour that burnishes his grip on the GOP base even as it threatens to undercut his near-term agenda for months to come.

title: Czech President Chides Cabinet Over Ukraine Aid, Seznam Says
title_cn: 塞兹南称捷克总统谴责内阁对乌克兰的援助
summary: President Petr Pavel chided the government for halting financial support for a Czech-led multinational ammunition program for Ukraine, saying the move weakened other allies’ willingness to contribute, Seznamzpravy.cz reported.
